title: convolvulus coelesyriacus
intro: Convolvulus coelesyriacus, also known as Syrian bindweed or Syrian morning glory, is a perennial plant species in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. Convolvulus coelesyriacus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal preparations.
